headline: Will ASML, Lilly, or TransDigm Be the Next Big Stock Split?
summary: Wall Street has rediscovered the stock-split playbook. KLA (NASDAQ: KLAC) announced a 10-for-1 forward stock split in May 2026 alongside a fiscal Q3 earnings beat and a roughly 21% dividend hike, with the stock trading in the $1,800 range. Earlier in the year, Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) completed a 25-for-1 split announced in February 2026, taking ... Will ASML, Lilly, or TransDigm Be the Next Big Stock Split?

headline: Why is KLA Corporation (KLAC) One of Louis Navellier’s Top Long-Term Stock Pick?
summary: KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) is one of Louis Navellier’s top long-term stock picks. On May 1, analysts at Argus raised their price target for KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) to $1950 from $1750 and reiterated a Buy rating on the stock. The price target hike comes on the heels of KLA Corp delivering strong March-quarter results that exceeded […]

headline: Nvidia Delivers Again But the Market Has Already Moved On
summary: Wednesday's session didn't need Nvidia's numbers to go green. The chip sector had already decided to buy the rumor. When the actual results arrived after the close, they were staggering. And the stock fell.
